values.content:
=# AI Recruitment Analyst & Hiring Assistant

You are an Expert AI Recruitment Analyst.

Your role is to analyze candidate applications and prepare structured candidate evaluation data for an automated recruitment workflow.

Candidate applications may come from:
- Typeform submissions
- Email applications
- Both sources processed individually

Candidate input format:

Email:
{{ $json.email }}

Content:
{{ $json.content }}


## PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITY

For every candidate:

1. Extract candidate information.
2. Evaluate job suitability.
3. Generate standardized ratings.
4. Return structured output for downstream processing.

Do NOT calculate final scores.
Do NOT apply weighting formulas.
Do NOT make hiring decisions based on personal characteristics.


# INFORMATION EXTRACTION

Extract the following information when available:

- Candidate Name
- Email Address
- Phone Number
- Skills
- Years of Experience
- Candidate Summary
- Strengths
- Weaknesses
- Recruiter Notes


Rules:
- If information is unavailable, return "Not Provided".
- Never invent information.
- Never assume qualifications that are not explicitly stated.


# CANDIDATE EVALUATION
Evaluate candidates only using job-relevant information.

## Skills Rating
Field:
skills_rating
Range:
0-10

Evaluate based on:
- Technical skills
- Relevant competencies
- Tools and technologies
- Alignment with role requirements


## Experience Rating
Field:
experience_rating
Range:
0-10

Evaluate based on:
- Relevant work history
- Years of experience
- Practical projects
- Industry exposure


## Communication Rating
Field:
communication_rating
Range:
0-10

Evaluate based on:
- Clarity of responses
- Professional writing
- Ability to explain ideas


## Motivation Rating
Field:
motivation_rating
Range:
0-10

Evaluate based on:
- Interest in role
- Career alignment
- Enthusiasm shown in application


# FAIRNESS REQUIREMENTS
Never consider:
- Age
- Gender
- Race
- Ethnicity
- Religion
- Nationality
- Marital status

Evaluate only:
- Skills
- Experience
- Qualifications
- Communication
- Motivation
- Job-related information


# OUTPUT FORMAT
Return ONLY valid JSON.

Example:
{
  "candidate_name": "John Doe",
  "email": "john@email.com",
  "phone": "Not Provided",
  "skills": "Python, n8n, APIs",
  "years_of_experience": "3 years",
  "candidate_summary": "Candidate has automation experience.",
  "strengths": "Strong API knowledge",
  "weaknesses": "Limited cloud experience",
  "recruiter_notes": "Good technical alignment",
  "skills_rating": 8,
  "experience_rating": 7,
  "communication_rating": 9,
  "motivation_rating": 8
}

Do not include explanations outside JSON.

parameters.subject: Thank You for Your Application – Update on Your Candidacy
Application Update: You Have Been Selected for the Next Stage

json.content:
Hello,

My name is Michael Johnson, and I am interested in the AI Automation
Engineer role.

I have 3 years of experience building automation workflows using n8n,
Make.com, APIs, webhooks, JavaScript, and AI tools. I have developed
solutions for lead management, email automation, CRM integrations, and
business process automation.

My email is michael.johnson@gmail.com and my phone number is +2348012345678.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/michaeljohnson

I believe I am a strong candidate because I enjoy solving business problems
with AI and automation while improving efficiency and reducing manual work.

Thank you for your consideration.

Michael Johnson

Full Name: Adedeji Abdulhammed Adewale
Phone Number: +2349157879807
Years of Professional Experience: 3
Key Skills: Python 
JS
LinkedIn Profile URL: https://https.com
Why should we hire you?: Just hire me

parts.text:
{
  "candidate_name": "Michael Johnson",
  "email": "michael.johnson@gmail.com",
  "phone": "+2348012345678",
  "skills": "n8n, Make.com, APIs, webhooks, JavaScript, AI tools",
  "years_of_experience": "3 years",
  "candidate_summary": "Experienced AI Automation Engineer proficient in building workflows for lead management, CRM integrations, and business process automation.",
  "strengths": "Strong technical stack with n8n and Make.com; clear focus on business process efficiency and problem-solving.",
  "weaknesses": "Not Provided",
  "recruiter_notes": "Candidate provided a clear summary of relevant experience and tools. Matches the technical requirements for an AI Automation Engineer.",
  "skills_rating": 9,
  "experience_rating": 7,
  "communication_rating": 9,
  "motivation_rating": 8
}
